pkgmetadata.longdescription: Jeepney is a pure Python implementation of D-Bus messaging. It has an IO-freehttpssans-io.readthedocs.io__ core, and integration modules for differentevent loops.D-Bus is an inter-process communication system, mainly used in Linux.To install Jeepney pip install jeepneyJeepney docs on Readthedocs httpsjeepney.readthedocs.ioenlatest__
